_comment: Base config deep-merged UNDER every site config (build.js loadConfig → deepMerge). Put ONLY cross-site defaults here: branding tokens + fonts + shared nav. Arrays (nav_links) are REPLACED wholesale by a site config that redefines them, not merged.
_branding_note: Extracted from the live arisedothan.com brand: cobalt-blue logo (rising-sun motif) = primary; warm sunrise gold + cream = secondary accents; deep navy for dark sections. KEY NAMES are load-bearing, generateVariablesCSS() maps each to a :root CSS var (accent→--accent, gold→--gold, black→--black, font_heading→--font-heading, …) that the stylesheets reference. Keep the keys; change values only.
_nav_note: Church navigation for a launch-phase plant. The header CTA button is 'Text Pastor Brian' (→ /connect/, the text-Pastor-Brian composer), the site's primary call to action this season, so 'Connect' is intentionally NOT in this array. 'Give' was re-added once online giving went live through the partner church's PushPay portal.
